=== systemd unit exec line + env for mskai-responder ===
# /etc/systemd/system/mskai-responder.service
[Unit]
Description=MSK AI Agent autonomous responder
After=network.target mskai-bot.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=azureuser
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Environment=HOME=/home/azureuser

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
